translated_files.kernel/kernel_gpu_cuda_wrapper_2.cu:
#include "common.h"

void kernel_cpu( int cores_arg,
                 record *records,
                 knode *knodes,
                 long knodes_elem,
                 int order,
                 long maxheight,
                 int count,
                 long *currKnode,
                 long *offset,
                 int *keys,
                 record *ans);

void kernel_cpu_2( int cores_arg,
                   knode *knodes,
                   long knodes_elem,
                   int order,
                   long maxheight,
                   int count,
                   long *currKnode,
                   long *offset,
                   long *lastKnode,
                   long *offset_2,
                   int *start,
                   int *end,
                   int *recstart,
                   int *reclength);

extern "C" void
kernel_gpu_cuda_wrapper(record *records,
                        long records_mem,
                        knode *knodes,
                        long knodes_elem,
                        long knodes_mem,
                        int order,
                        long maxheight,
                        int count,
                        long *currKnode,
                        long *offset,
                        int *keys,
                        record *ans) {
    (void)records_mem;
    (void)knodes_mem;
    kernel_cpu(1,
               records,
               knodes,
               knodes_elem,
               order,
               maxheight,
               count,
               currKnode,
               offset,
               keys,
               ans);
}

extern "C" void
kernel_gpu_cuda_wrapper_2(knode *knodes,
                          long knodes_elem,
                          long knodes_mem,
                          int order,
                          long maxheight,
                          int count,
                          long *currKnode,
                          long *offset,
                          long *lastKnode,
                          long *offset_2,
                          int *start,
                          int *end,
                          int *recstart,
                          int *reclength) {
    (void)knodes_mem;
    kernel_cpu_2(1,
                 knodes,
                 knodes_elem,
                 order,
                 maxheight,
                 count,
                 currKnode,
                 offset,
                 lastKnode,
                 offset_2,
                 start,
                 end,
                 recstart,
                 reclength);
}
